🟢
Easy Mode
Basic definitions · Fundamental concepts · Straightforward
Foundation Level Conceptual — Qs
🟡
Medium Mode
Application · Mixed topics · GSEB exam pattern
Application GSEB Style — Qs
🔴
Hard Mode
Board exam level · Tricky Qs · PYQ board questions mix
Board Level PYQ Mix — Qs
🎯
Board Exam Mode
Curated board-pattern questions · All difficulty levels mixed
GSEB Pattern Board Ready 35 Qs
🤖
Adaptive Mode
AI adjusts difficulty in real-time based on your answers
Smart AI Personalised ∞ Dynamic
⚙️ How the Algorithm Works
🟢
Easy — First 30% of question bank. Definitions, basic rules, simple recall.
🟡
Medium — Middle 35%. Application, GSEB format, multi-concept questions.
🔴
Hard — Last 35% + all PYQ board questions mixed in randomly.
🤖
Adaptive — Starts at Medium. Promotes to Hard after 3 correct. Drops to Easy after 2 wrong. Rebalances continuously.
